description: Baseline: 1327 tests in 22.14s. Top bottlenecks: UW 500 retry (7s real sleep), subprocess timeout (5s), IB connect retry (3s+1s), client ID allocation (1s).
Patch time.sleep in UW 500 test (-7s), IB connect retry tests (-4s), client ID allocation test (-1s), reduce subprocess timeout 5s→2s (-3s). Total: 22.14s → 7.11s (-68%)

asi.uw_500_fix: Added patch('time.sleep') around test_500_raises_server_error — 500 is retryable so client was sleeping 1+2+4=7s
asi.ib_retry_fix: Added @patch('time.sleep') to test_connect_retries_on_transient_error and test_connect_exhausts_retries — saved 4s total
asi.subprocess_fix: Reduced timeout from 5s to 2s for test_module_error_falls_back — the module fails fast, timeout is just a safety net
asi.remaining_top_tests: test_module_error (2s real subprocess), test_timeout_kills (0.5s), evaluate tests (0.3s each from import/mock overhead), batched_relay tests (0.1s each from asyncio.sleep)
